title: bromus setifolius var. minor
intro: Bromus setifolius var. minor, also known as the lesser chess or lesser chess grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Bromus setifolius var. minor include reducing anxiety and stress, alleviating menstrual cramps, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
